questionHtml: Determine the work required to increase the separation of the plates.
markschemeHtml:
work = (energy in the new arrangement) − (initial energy) ✓

«energy increased by factor 4 hence» work = 3 × 4.3 × 10−8 =1.3 × 10−7 «J» ✓

 

Allow ECF from 9(a).

Award [2] for a BCA.

meta.title: Determine the work required to increase the separation of the plates.
